reasoning: Both audits failed at source download stage (makepkg --nobuild), preventing review of critical build/install scripts. Initial PKGBUILD audits were clean but incomplete without source code analysis.
coverage_issues: All source files skipped: Build scripts (Makefile, autogen.sh), install hooks, and theme assets not reviewed due to download failure
PKGBUILD's build()/package() functions not validated against actual source content
false_negatives: Potential risks in un-reviewed source: Build scripts executing untrusted code, install hooks with filesystem operations, theme assets executing binaries
learnings: Improve source download reliability: Implement retries, fallback to direct git clone for VCS packages
Prioritize review of PKGBUILD's build()/package() functions first to identify source dependencies
Add network diagnostics to distinguish transient errors from malicious blocking
Require models to explicitly note un-reviewed high-risk file categories in skipped audits
